'''Trimpian''' was a tangy finger food capable of getting stuck in close-set [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]]. It could be served with [[miasra sauce]]. The odd taste was believed by some to be a sign that the meal made the eater's skin slightly flame retardant.

{{Food-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Trimpian appeared in the video game ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a massively multiplayer online roleplaying game developed by [[Sony]] and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].
